display_information.name: Marco
display_information.description: Your freight-ops coworker — live Italian-port freight tracking, in Slack.
display_information.long_description: Marco is an AI coworker that tracks live commercial freight traffic (cargo ships and RoPax ferries) across Italian ports. Ask about port congestion, where a vessel is, live ETAs and delays, or set proactive watches that alert your channel when a port clears or a ship runs late. No dashboard, no setup — he lives in Slack and DMs you when something changes.
